evals.prompt: Audit my PhD application package. I have a CV, SOP outline, target schools, and three possible recommenders. My profile is mostly ML systems projects with one NLP research project, but my SOP says I want to do AI safety. What are the biggest risks?
evals.expected_output: A holistic package audit that identifies narrative inconsistency, evidence gaps, recommender/program-fit risks, and priority fixes.

evals.prompt: I have two weeks before deadlines. Across my CV, SOP draft, research statement, professor fit notes, and recommendation letters, tell me what to fix first and what to stop worrying about.
evals.expected_output: A deadline-aware readiness report with package inventory, high-impact fixes, next fixes, and nice-to-have polish items.

evals.prompt: Check whether my application narrative is consistent: my CV emphasizes robotics projects, my SOP emphasizes representation learning, my faculty list is mostly HCI professors, and one recommender only knows me from a course.
evals.expected_output: A cross-document coherence audit that flags conflicting research identity, weak fit evidence, recommender risk, and concrete alignment fixes.
